name: Omnivibro-octovecti-bell
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)
(If an Identity only has Attack Skills that gain [Vibration] Count on self, this E.G.O Gift does not activate for them)

When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts [Vibration] Potency or Count, or consumes [Vibration] Count on self: inflict (# of remaining Coins) [Vibration] Potency against the target and gain (# of remaining Coins) Tremor Count (max +3 Tremor Count gained per Skill). If the target does not have [Vibration], inflict +3 [Vibration] Count

Turn Start: gain (1 + ([Vibration] Count on self / 5)) [ParryingResultUp]. (max 3)

When using a Skill that consumes [Vibration] Count on self: when defeating or Staggering a target, gain ([Vibration] Count consumed / 2) [Vibration] Count (once per Skill)

Skills deal +([Vibration] consumed on self + [Vibration] Potency on the enemy + 5)% damage (except E.G.O Skills; max 50%)
When the target has [VibrationNesting], when triggering either [Switch_Vibration] or [FusionVibration] against the enemy with a type of [Vibration] they don't have in their [VibrationNesting], extend the [VibrationNesting] on target at Turn End to the next turn
